title: pouteria cubensis
intro: Pouteria cubensis, also known as the Cuban lapacho, is a species of tree native to Cuba and the surrounding islands, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. Its medicinal properties have been attributed to the presence of naphthoquinones, specifically lapachol, which has been shown to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Pouteria cubensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Pouteria cubensis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
